commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: UI: localize logs hardcoded labels
target.body:
## Summary

- Problem: the Logs screen still had several hardcoded English labels, filter copy, export labels, and empty-state text even when a non-English locale was selected.
- Why it matters: that leaves mixed-language UI in another top-level Control UI tab and weakens the locale experience.
- What changed: moved the Logs screen labels into locale keys and wired `logs.ts` through `t(...)`.
- What did NOT change (scope boundary): no log streaming behavior, filtering behavior, or export logic changes.

## Change Type (select all)

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor required for the fix
- [x] Docs
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Chore/infra

## Scope (select all touched areas)

- [ ] Gateway / orchestration
- [ ] Skills / tool execution
- [ ] Auth / tokens
- [ ] Memory / storage
- [ ] Integrations
- [ ] API / contracts
- [x] UI / DX
- [ ] CI/CD / infra

## Linked Issue/PR

- Closes #
- Related #61036
- Related #61054
- Related #61062
- Related #61073
- [ ] This PR fixes a bug or regression

## Root Cause (if applicable)

- Root cause: these Logs labels were still embedded directly in `ui/src/ui/views/logs.ts` instead of using locale files.
- Missing detection / guardrail: locale infrastructure exists, but the screen still carried hardcoded copy.
- Contributing context (if known): this PR intentionally keeps the cleanup to one screen.

## Regression Test Plan (if applicable)

- Coverage level that should have caught this:
  - [x] Unit test
  - [ ] Seam / integration test
  - [ ] End-to-end test
  - [ ] Existing coverage already sufficient
- Target test or file:
  - `ui/src/i18n/test/translate.test.ts`
- Scenario the test should lock in:
  - locale lookups for the new Logs keys resolve correctly.
- Why this is the smallest reliable guardrail:
  - the change is isolated to locale keys plus one view.
- Existing test that already covers this (if any):
  - `ui/src/i18n/test/translate.test.ts`
- If no new test is added, why not:
  - existing i18n coverage plus successful UI build were sufficient for this scoped change.

## User-visible / Behavior Changes

- The Logs screen no longer shows those hardcoded English labels when pt-BR is selected.

## Diagram (if applicable)

N/A

## Security Impact (required)

- New permissions/capabilities? (`Yes/No`): No
- Secrets/tokens handling changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- New/changed network calls? (`Yes/No`): No
- Command/tool execution surface changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- Data access scope changed? (`Yes/No`): No
- If any `Yes`, explain risk + mitigation:

## Repro + Verification

### Environment

- OS: Windows 10
- Runtime/container: local Node/pnpm dev environment
- Model/provider: N/A
- Integration/channel (if any): Control UI Logs screen
- Relevant config (redacted): N/A

### Steps

1. Switch the Control UI locale away from English.
2. Open the Logs tab.
3. Inspect the title, subtitle, loading label, export label, filter label, auto-follow label, file label, truncated notice, and empty state.

### Expected

- Those Logs labels should come from locale files instead of staying hardcoded in English.

### Actual

- The Logs screen now uses locale-backed strings for those labels.

## Evidence

- [x] Failing test/log before + passing after
- [ ] Trace/log snippets
- [ ] Screenshot/recording
- [ ] Perf numbers (if relevant)

Validation:

```text
pnpm --dir ui build
pnpm test ui/src/i18n/test/translate.test.ts -- --project ui
```

## Human Verification (required)

- Verified scenarios:
  - reviewed the Logs diff to ensure only hardcoded labels were moved to locale keys
  - confirmed local build passes
  - confirmed targeted UI translation test passes
- Edge cases checked:
  - preserved filtering and export behavior while localizing only labels and messages
  - kept file-path interpolation explicit through `{value}`
- What you did **not** verify:
  - full browser walkthrough of every locale on the Logs screen

## Review Conversations

- [x] I replied to or resolved every bot review conversation I addressed in this PR.
- [x] I left unresolved only the conversations that still need reviewer or maintainer judgment.

## Compatibility / Migration

- Backward compatible? (`Yes/No`): Yes
- Config/env changes? (`Yes/No`): No
- Migration needed? (`Yes/No`): No
- If yes, exact upgrade steps:

## Risks and Mitigations

- Risk: other screens may still contain hardcoded strings.
  - Mitigation: this PR intentionally scopes the cleanup to the Logs screen only.
target.author: rubensfox20

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
